description: Fraud where criminals build emotional trust through dating, matrimonial or social media platforms and then request money, gifts, personal information or intimate material for exploitation.
recommended_actions: Stop sending money, gift cards or personal documents to the person.
Do not share intimate images, OTPs, passwords or banking details.
Preserve chats, profiles, phone numbers, payment receipts, images and video call records.
Report financial fraud immediately by calling 1930.
If blackmail or intimate image threats are involved, report on the National Cyber Crime Reporting Portal.

rules.name: Emergency Money Request
rules.explanation: Requests money after creating emotional trust, often using medical or family emergencies.
examples: My mother is in hospital. Please send money urgently.
I will return it tomorrow. I need temporary help.

rules.name: Gift Customs or Parcel Fee
rules.explanation: Claims a valuable gift or parcel is stuck with customs and asks the victim to pay clearance charges.
examples: I sent you a gift from London. Pay customs fee to release it.
Airport officer needs clearance charge for your parcel.

rules.name: Matrimonial Profile Money Demand
rules.explanation: Uses matrimonial or marriage pretexts to request money for travel, visa, family or wedding expenses.
examples: I found you on matrimonial site. Need visa processing money before marriage.
Send money for urgent family approval and travel.

rules.name: Refuses In Person Verification
rules.explanation: Avoids live verification or meeting while continuing to build emotional dependence.
examples: I cannot video call because I am on duty abroad.
Camera is not working. We will meet after you help me.

rules.name: Love Bombing and Fast Commitment
rules.explanation: Rapid emotional commitment is used to build trust and isolate the victim from advice.
examples: You are my soulmate. Do not tell anyone about us.
I will marry you soon, just trust me completely.

rules.name: Intimate Image Sextortion
rules.explanation: Uses intimate images or video recordings to extort money or force further actions.
examples: Pay now or I will send your video to your family.
Send money and I will delete the private recording.

rules.name: Foreign Professional Impersonation
rules.explanation: Impersonates a high-status foreign or NRI profile to gain trust and explain why meeting is delayed.
examples: I am an NRI doctor working abroad and want to marry you.
I am in merchant navy, so I cannot meet immediately.

rules.name: Requests Bank Account or Identity Documents
rules.explanation: Requests identity documents or bank details for identity theft, mule accounts or financial abuse.
examples: Send Aadhaar and PAN so I can book our tickets.
Receive funds in your account and transfer to my agent.

rules.name: Investment or Crypto Romance Pitch
rules.explanation: Combines romantic trust with investment fraud by persuading the victim to deposit into fake platforms.
examples: Invest with me on this crypto platform for our future.
My mentor will help us earn guaranteed profit.
